raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "weens Wihr̄ jeb Seeu̅ atrasts
tohp/ kas ta KUNGA tawa Dee-
wa Preekschâ taunu darra/ka tas
wina Derribu pahrkahyj.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka wiꞥſch eet un kalpo zit-
teem Deeweetm/un peeluhdstohs/
jeb to Sauli / jeb to Mehneti/ jeb
wiſfu Debbes Spehku / ko es ne
efinu pawehlejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas tohp tew pasaz-
zihts / ka tu to dsirdt / tad buhs
tew to labbi iſwaizahrt / un reds/
irr tas teeti / ka tas teescham ta
irr/schi Negantiba irr eekſch Isra-
eka darrita.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad buhs tew to paschu
Wihrn / jeb to paschu Seewu/
kas cho niknu Leetu irr darrifschi
pee tawahm Wahrtim iswest/(es
fakku) to paschu Wihrn un to
paschu Seewu / nn tohs ar Ak-
mineemi nomehtaht/ ka tee mirst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Us diweju jeb treju Leezinee-
fu Wahrd̄ buhs tam nokautam
tapt/ kam jamirst/ weena weeni-
ga Leezineeka Wahrd̄ pehz tam
ne buhs mirt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Laid to Leezineeku Rohka ta
pirma pretti winnu irr/winnu no-
kaut / un pehz to wiſfu Lauschu
Rohka/ ta buhs tew to taunu no
fawas Starpas no tewi nohst lift.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad tahda Leeta tew Soh-
da wiſſai genhta irr starp Affini
un Affint/ starp Darrischanu un
Darrischanu / starp Wainu un
Wainu / jeb Bahrschanas Leetas
tawas Wahrtis / tad buhs tew
zeltees/un us to Weetu eet/ ko tas
KUNGStaws Deews isredsehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tew buhs nahkt pee teen
Preestexeem/ teem Lewiteem / uu
pee teem Sohgeem/kas to Brihd̄
tur buhs / un tew buhs waizaht /
tad buhs winxeem tew to Teesu
stahstiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tew buhs darriht pehz
ta Wahrd̄ Paivehleschanas / ka
winxi tew fazzihs/ no tahs Wee-
tas/ko tasKUNGS isredsehs/un
tew buhs wehra nenit un darrih̄
wiſfu/ ko tee tew mahzihs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz tahs Bautlibas Pa-
wehleschanas/ko tee tew mahzihs/
un pehz tahs Teefas / ko tee ten
fazzihs/ buhs tew darriht/ tew ne
buhs atkahpt no ta Wahrd̄/ ka
tee tew fazzihs/nei pa labbas ne
pa kreifas Rohkas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ja kaslabban pahrgalwi
gi turrefees ne flauidams tam
Preestexam/kas stahw tam KUN-
GAM jawam Deewam kalpo-
dans / jeb tam Sohgam / tam
pascham buhs mirt/ un tew buhs
to taunn no Israelta atxeint.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka wiſfi Laudis to dsird̄
un bihstahs/ne wairs pahrgalwi
gi turredancees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad tu nahkt tai Semmē
fo tas KUNGStaws Deews ten
dehs / uu eemantofi to / un dsib-
wofi eekſch tahs / un tu fazziſt
es eezelfchu pabe mann weeni
Kehninu/ itt ka wiſfi Laudis/ ka
apkahrt mann irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad eezell par Kehninu
pahr tewim / ko tas KUNGS-
taws Deews isredsehs / no tawi
Brahtu Widdus buhs tew pah-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
